name: io.github.knowledgepa3/gia-mcp-server
title: GIA Governance Intelligence Automation
description: AI governance engine — decision controls, compliance, audit chains, knowledge packs.

environment_variables.name: GIA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your GIA API key (required). Get one at https://gia.aceadvising.com

environment_variables.name: GIA_SERVER_URL
environment_variables.description: Custom GIA server URL (optional, defaults to https://gia.aceadvising.com/mcp)
